question: How do you prefer to solve problems?

options.text: Writing code, analyzing logic, and building digital tools
Analyzing financial trends, balancing budgets, or modeling markets
Creating layouts, designing logos, or sketching visual graphics
Helping people resolve personal challenges, teaching, or advising

question: Which work environment sounds most appealing to you?

options.text: A quiet space focused on research, analysis, and data systems
A collaborative startup setting where roles and designs evolve rapidly
A corporate boardroom pitching financial strategies and business deals
A community center, hospital, or university campus guiding others

question: When working on a group project, which role do you naturally fall into?

options.text: The developer/builder who implements the technical backend
The project coordinator who manages deadlines, budget, and scope
The presenter who crafts the pitch, design slides, and marketing story
The mediator who keeps the team happy and resolves disputes

question: What type of articles, videos, or news do you consume in your free time?

options.text: AI developments, coding tutorials, and new open-source software
UI/UX case studies, logo designs, typography, and visual artwork
Stock market updates, economic cycles, and venture capital rounds
